Defts. Cadelinia & Leung, Inc., Dba Prudential California Realty, Samuel D. Cadelinia, Richard Goldstein & Randi Goldstein'S Motion For Stay Until 6-29-02 (Ost Filed 5/31/02)
Off Calendar Jun-12-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Milton V. Fajardo, Esq., GINDER, SUNDERLAND & CARLSON, 818-996-77800, appeared on behalf of defendant and moving party Cadelinia & Leung.

There being no appearances in opposition, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as its order: Defendants CADELINIA & LEUNG's motion for a stay is granted until June 26, 2002. Order signed in open court. (AJR/KH) Patrick Heard CSR#11055

MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Enforcing Stay;
Off Calendar Jun-12-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. There being no appearances the Court adopted its tentative ruling as its order: Defendant GOLDSTEIN's motion for order enforcing stay is granted until June 26, 2002. (AJR/KH) Patrick Heard CSR#11055
